name: Trade Flow Exhaustion into Ask Wall (Contra-Signal)
hypothesis: An extreme spike in buyer-initiated trade flow (high positive z-score of trade_imbalance_signed) that runs directly into a thick wall of resting sellers (high ask_depth_concentration) is an absorption/exhaustion pattern. The buying pressure will likely fail, leading to a price reversal. Thus, a high positive signal value predicts a negative price move.
mutation_note: Novel combination based on preliminary findings that both high trade imbalance z-scores and high ask concentration can be contra-indicators. This spec tests the hypothesis that their confluence creates a strong reversal signal.
